content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Markets broadly firm with strong sector rallies in PSU banks, power, FMCG, and pharma — but VIX at 18.63 signals elevated uncertainty. Book is 74% deployed with no SLs set on any existing position, which is the top risk to address. Priority this tick is setting stop-losses on all 9 holdings, not adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%), PSU bank sector leadership. Stock at 52w high zone. Setting SL just below recent swing low area (~75.50, ~5% below entry) to protect capital, target 88 (~8% upside, R:R ~1.3 but improves if price moves in our favor). Dilution overhang from capital raise is known."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 FY26 (PAT +26% QoQ, GNPA improved to 0.93%), JPM OW TP 1000. Stock up +8.76% today on results. SL at 935 (~5% below entry, below prior day low 899 would be wider but 935 protects gains close to breakeven). Target 1080 aligns with JPM TP. R:R ~1.9."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL at 120 (~4% below entry) below SMA20 121.92. Target 135 on continued central-bank bid and geopolitical premium. R:R ~2.0."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Power sector rally, Nabha acquisition accretive, +1.4% unrealized. SL at 1580 (below today's low 1645 would be too close given volatility; 1580 is ~4.2% below entry, near prior consolidation). Target 1800 (~9% upside). R:R ~2.1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, volume +18%) — strongest FMCG print. Stock gapped up to 52w high. SL at 1355 (~4% below entry) just below today's low. Target 1500 (~6% upside). Rich valuation limits upside room. R:R ~1.5."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 25 — binary event risk 2 trading days out. SL at 995 (~5.1% below entry, just below SMA9 968 area is too wide; 995 keeps risk tight). Target 1130 on universal bank conversion optimism. R:R ~1.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 29, FDA audit clean (4 procedural 483s), Amphetamine ER approval. Stock near 52w high. SL at 645 (~5.3% below entry) below recent consolidation. Target 740 on earnings breakout. R:R ~1.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 — binary event. Weak volume growth relative to Nestle raises bar. SL at 2260 (~4.7% below entry). Target 2520 in line with broker consensus. R:R ~1.7."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 386.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power play, peak summer demand tailwind, 1000 MW Tehri PSP operational. SL at 386 (~4.6% below entry) below SMA9. Target 430 (52w high zone, ~6.3% upside). R:R ~1.4."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have an OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 214 pending from 1500m ago. Per order hygiene rules, not stacking a second entry. Letting existing order work. Power cluster already well represented via TORNTPOWER, ADANIENSOL would be excess (not adding)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -96% YoY on goodwill impairment, gear revenue -21%. +18% gap-up looks like short-covering, not fundamental. Fade candidate but no clean short setup. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "PL downgrade to REDUCE with TP Rs 1,354 (below current). PC resin oversupply, Chinese dumping. +15% gap-up likely event-driven spike. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIENSOL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY — major binary event. Stock at 52w high after +30% run. Power cluster already overweight in book (TORNTPOWER, NTPC, pending ADANIPOWER). Not adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PSUBNKBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Already have MAHABANK (PSU bank) exposure. Adding ETF would double up on same cluster. SBI Q4 in May is binary for the ETF. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Attractive broker TPs (Rs 210-248) but book already 74% deployed. Cash buffer discipline. Revisit if a current position exits."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 27. NCLT amalgamation pending. +12.5% spike with no clear catalyst — chasing not advisable. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "Monitoring-only. Q4 result reaction later today. No pre-result trade."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w low, falling knife. No bounce confirmation. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 1475 is a known event. Book deployed at 74%, no room without trimming. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "reasoning": "+9.35% spike, no clean entry setup. Cash discipline. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "reasoning": "Already have banking exposure via AUBANK + MAHABANK. Not adding another banking name."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "MAHABANK", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 75.50, "reasoning": "Setting initial SL at 75.50 — position currently -3.1%. Protects capital with strong Q4 thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 935.00, "reasoning": "Setting SL at 935 below prior swing. Strong Q4 and JPM OW rating justify holding for upside to 1080."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 120.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL at 120 below SMA20. Thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPOWER", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "In profit, trailing SL below recent breakout level."},
    {"symbol": "NESTLEIND", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1355.00, "reasoning": "Blowout Q4, protecting near entry with SL at 1355."},
    {"symbol": "AUBANK", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 995.00, "reasoning": "Q4 on April 25 — event risk. Tight SL warranted."},
    {"symbol": "GRANULES", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 645.00, "reasoning": "Q4 April 29, positive setup. SL below recent base."},
    {"symbol": "HINDUNILVR", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 2260.00, "reasoning": "Q4 April 30 binary. SL at 2260 limits downside on weak FMCG backdrop."},
    {"symbol": "NTPC", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 386.00, "reasoning": "Defensive, summer demand tailwind. SL below SMA9."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Keep watching: GAIL (broker TPs Rs 210-248 offer upside if portfolio makes room), AUROPHARMA (buyback catalyst if price dips to attractive levels). INFY post-result reaction for potential setup. HCLTECH for bounce confirmation before any entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed — at the ceiling. Cash buffer at 26.5% respects 20% minimum. Today's critical action was setting STOP-LOSSES on all 9 positions which previously had SL=0.00 (i.e., no protection). No new entries justified given deployment level and pending ADANIPOWER order. Multiple positions face earnings event risk in next 10 days (AUBANK 25th, PIRAMAL 27th, GRANULES 29th, HUL 30th) — monitor closely. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER) is near the 20% cluster ceiling; no additional power exposure."
}
